creator: jpaetzel@FreeBSD.org
text:
I keep forgetting to delete this port.

We are grabbing it from an SGI repo, and they aren't sure they have 
redistribution rights.  After looking at the licensing I'm pretty sure FreeBSD 
doesn't have distribution rights either.  It's also abandonware in such a way 
that obtaining those rights would be impossible at this point.

net/dante is a mostly compatable alternative, dependent ports need to be 
switched to try and use that, and then this port deleted.  My issue is I no 
longer have a way to run test SOCKS, so any testing I did would be compile 
testing only.

Due to the lack of complaints I feel that SOCKS5 is in very little use 
anymore, and the deletion of this port would not realy be noticed by anyone.

While I appreciate the effort made to resurrect this, and apologize for not 
deleting it sooner or even marking it depricated, I think it would be best if 
this patch were not applied, and effort be spent making apps woek with dante, 
if indeed SOCKS5 functionality is needed anymore.

-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel
FreeBSD - The Power To Serve
